intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely invalidated by the current visual evidence. P1 (String of Nickels) and P2 (Mexican Mint) are not visible as living specimens. P3 (Pothos) and P4 (Silver Guest) are not identifiable as distinct entities in the provided frames.

inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No foliage detected in black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: The white rabbit anchor is absent; no Pothos foliage detected.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Consistently dark, damp, and undisturbed across all frames.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of white, fragmented material (likely crushed eggshells) on the surface of the black pot, which remains static throughout the sequence.
biome_observations.desk_surface: A white cylindrical object (likely a sensor or container) appears in the T-5 frame and remains present through the current frame.

temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-4: Introduction of a white cylindrical object near the yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.T-4_to_T-1: Static state; no growth or movement detected.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: No change; the biome appears dormant or devoid of the registered plant life.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total systemic failure regarding the registered plant specimens. There is no evidence of photosynthesis, turgor pressure, or vegetative growth. The environment appears to be a sterile or failed propagation setup.
anomalies: New Introduction: White cylindrical object (sensor/vial) introduced at T-5.
Intervention: Crushed eggshells present on soil surface of the black pot.
Missing Anchor: The white rabbit (P3 scale anchor) is absent from all frames.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete absence of the expected botanical specimens. The pots contain only soil and inorganic debris (eggshells). The introduction of a sensor-like object at T-5 suggests an attempt to monitor the environment, but the biological components (P1-P4) are not present or have suffered total mortality prior to the start of this sequence.
